testcase.name: testFullApiUiFlow
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:55885/api/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "email": "eve.holt@reqres.in", "password": "cityslicka" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:54 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 29
{ "token": "mock-reqres-token" } [API Precondition] Token received: mock-reqres-token Request method: GET Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:55885/api/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:54 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 958
{ "page": 1, "per_page": 6, "total": 12, "total_pages": 2, "data": [ { "id": 1, "email": "user1@reqres.in", "first_name": "User1", "last_name": "Mock1", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/1-image.jpg" }, { "id": 2, "email": "user2@reqres.in", "first_name": "User2", "last_name": "Mock2", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/2-image.jpg" }, { "id": 3, "email": "user3@reqres.in", "first_name": "User3", "last_name": "Mock3", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/3-image.jpg" }, { "id": 4, "email": "user4@reqres.in", "first_name": "User4", "last_name": "Mock4", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/4-image.jpg" }, { "id": 5, "email": "user5@reqres.in", "first_name": "User5", "last_name": "Mock5", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/5-image.jpg" }, { "id": 6, "email": "user6@reqres.in", "first_name": "User6", "last_name": "Mock6", "avatar": "https://reqres.in/img/faces/6-image.jpg" } ], "support": { "url": "https://reqres.in/#support-heading", "text": "To keep ReqRes free, contributions towards server costs are appreciated!" } } [API Precondition] API alive: true [API Check] reqres.in is alive [UI] Cart badge = 2 [UI] Cart has 2 items
testcase.system-err: Mar 25, 2026 11:28:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 25, 2026 11:28:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.154. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testCreatePost
testcase.system-out:
[JsonPlaceholderSupport] Using local mock server for stable execution at http://127.0.0.1:58367 Request method: POST Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:58367/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "title": "Test Title", "body": "Test Body", "userId": 1 } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:56 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 61
{ "title": "Test Title", "body": "Test Body", "userId": 1, "id": 101 }

testGetAllPosts
testGetSinglePost

Request method: GET Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:58367/posts/1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:56 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 130
{ "userId": 1, "id": 1, "title": "sunt aut facere repellat provident occaecati excepturi optio reprehenderit", "body": "quia et suscipit" }

testcase.name: testUpdatePost

Request method: PUT Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:58367/posts/1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": 1, "title": "Updated Title", "body": "Updated Body", "userId": 1 } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:56 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 65
{ "title": "Updated Title", "body": "Updated Body", "userId": 1, "id": 1 }

testcase.name: testGetCommentsByQueryParam
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:58367/comments?postId=1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: postId=1 Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:56 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 496
[ { "postId": 1, "id": 1, "name": "Comment name 1", "email": "comment1@example.com", "body": "Comment body 1" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 2, "name": "Comment name 2", "email": "comment2@example.com", "body": "Comment body 2" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 3, "name": "Comment name 3", "email": "comment3@example.com", "body": "Comment body 3" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 4, "name": "Comment name 4", "email": "comment4@example.com", "body": "Comment body 4" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 5, "name": "Comment name 5", "email": "comment5@example.com", "body": "Comment body 5" } ]

testcase.name: testGetAllUsers

Request method: GET Request URI: http://127.0.0.1:58367/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 16:28:56 GMT Content-type: application/json Content-length: 1686
[ { "id": 1, "name": "User 1", "username": "user1", "email": "user1@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 1", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 2, "name": "User 2", "username": "user2", "email": "user2@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 2", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 3, "name": "User 3", "username": "user3", "email": "user3@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 3", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 4, "name": "User 4", "username": "user4", "email": "user4@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 4", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 5, "name": "User 5", "username": "user5", "email": "user5@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 5", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 6, "name": "User 6", "username": "user6", "email": "user6@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 6", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 7, "name": "User 7", "username": "user7", "email": "user7@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 7", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 8, "name": "User 8", "username": "user8", "email": "user8@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 8", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 9, "name": "User 9", "username": "user9", "email": "user9@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 9", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } }, { "id": 10, "name": "User 10", "username": "user10", "email": "user10@example.com", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 10", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874" } } ]
